# Kue Kito - Traditional Bengkulu Bakery

Pusat oleh-oleh khas Bengkulu terbaik menyajikan cita rasa otentik yang dipanggang segar setiap hari.

## Information
- Shop Name: Kue Kito
- Website: https://kuekito.com
- Location: Jl. Cimanuk Komplek Cimanuk Indah No. 10 RT 5 RW 2 Kec. Gading Cempaka, Bengkulu
- Primary Ordering: WhatsApp (6282183904974)
- Socials: Instagram (@kuekito), Facebook (kuekito)

## Main Products (Menu)
- **Bay Tat**: Legendary royal Bengkulu pastry with soft buttery crust and pineapple jam filling.
- **Bolu Koja**: Fragrant green sponge cake with pandan and coconut milk.
- **Kue Siput**: Crunchy snail-shaped peanut cookies with secret spices.
- **Lapis Legit**: Indonesian thousand-layer cake, rich in butter and spices.
- **Kue Perut Punai**: Traditional fried snack from glutinous rice flour.
- **Lepek Binti**: Savory cake filled with spiced minced beef wrapped in banana leaves.

## Context
This site is a digital menu designed to funnel customers to WhatsApp for orders. It represents the culinary heritage of Bengkulu, Indonesia.
